creator: ashley.wil@gmail.com
text:
Compiling linux-jdk-16 with 'Install demos and samples' does not work:

===>  linux-sun-jdk-1.6.0.45 You must manually fetch the J2SE demos and samples for the Linux platform (jdk-6u45-linux-i586-demos.tar.gz) from http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html, place it in /usr/ports/distfiles and then run make again.
*** [all] Error code 1


File jdk-6u45-linux-i586-demos.tar.gz does not exist at "http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html"

Unless I'm missing something, the latest demo file is :
jdk-6u35-linux-i586-demos.tar.gz

Fix: 

I'm not sure who uses these files or what they use them for, but perhaps pointing to jdk-6u35-linux-i586-demos.tar.gz would be adequate?
